description: On-demand sweep across a given set of target repo paths for SAP CAP messaging patterns (srv.emit/srv.on, cds.connect.to('messaging'), Event Mesh binding config in mta.yaml/.cdsrc.json) and drafts/appends producer-consumer topic cross-references to .claude/knowledge/event-map.md. Invoke deliberately with an explicit repo-path/domain-folder list, or 'all' to sweep every checked-out repo already known via .claude/knowledge/repo-map.md — never runs automatically as part of the bug pipeline.
